stemHtml:
Refer to figures or to Stuttgart charts 10-3P and 10-3C from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
The pilot is advised by ATC to expect either DKB 9B RNAV SID (OVERLAY) or DKB 9B SID. Which of the following applies to DKB 9B RNAV SID (OVERLAY)?

options.a: It utilises on-board GPS to fly the DKB 9B SID.
options.b: It may be flown only with reference to VOR and DME.
options.c: It requires both the pilots and the aircraft to have an RNAV 1 certification.
options.d: It requires the on-board ADF to be serviceable.
